items.title: 28 Days of Claude API - Day 22 - Web Fetch
items.raw_summary:
28 Days of Claude API - Day 22 - Web Fetch

Web Search (Day 8) returns snippets.

Web Fetch returns the whole page.

Pass a URL. Claude reads the full content like articles, docs, PDFs. No scraping infra needed.

Tip: Combine Search and Fetch! No extra charge. Just token costs

items.title: 28 Days of Claude API - Day 21 - Text Editor Tool
items.raw_summary:
28 Days of Claude API - Day 21 - Text Editor Tool

Give Claude a scalpel, not a sledgehammer

The Text Editor Tool lets Claude view files, find exactly what needs changing, & replace it with surgical precision

view → str_replace → done

No full rewrites or hallucinated diffs

items.title: 🎨 Generating or editing images at scale?
items.raw_summary:
🎨 Generating or editing images at scale?

Batch API now supports GPT Image models: gpt-image-1.5, chatgpt-image-latest, gpt-image-1, gpt-image-1-mini.

Submit up to 50,000 generations or edits as async jobs at 50% lower cost with separate rate limits.

https://t.co/9W6TCeBGw3 ht

items.title: 28 Days of Claude API - Day 19 - The Bash Tool
items.raw_summary:
28 Days of Claude API - Day 19 - The Bash Tool

Give Claude a terminal.

Persistent shell session. Every command builds on the last.

Install. Write. Run. Debug. All in one flow.

You own the sandbox. Claude owns the terminal.

items.title: 28 Days of Claude API - Day 20 - 1M Token Context Window
items.raw_summary:
28 Days of Claude API - Day 20 - 1M Token Context Window

~750,000 words in a single API call. Just pass the "context-1m-2025-08-07" beta header.

Entire codebases. Full legal contracts. Hours of transcripts. All at once.

No chunking. No retrieval hacks. Just full send it.

items.title: This is probably obvious but my tax season got a lot easier this year
items.raw_summary:
This is probably obvious but my tax season got a lot easier this year

1. Throw all your silly PDFs in a folder. Yes, even the one from the robo-investor that somehow makes 100 trades every day
2. Open up the tax tool of your choice in Chrome
3. Let Claude Cowork do the rest
